hero.title: The Future of AI Infrastructure
hero.subtitle: Build, deploy, and scale intelligent systems with our next-generation platform. Trusted by engineering teams at the world's most innovative companies.

about.title: Built by Engineers, for Engineers
about.description:
Nexus.AI was founded in 2022 by a team of ex-Google and ex-OpenAI engineers who saw a gap in the market: AI infrastructure was too complex, too fragile, and too expensive.

We built a platform that abstracts away the pain of ML ops, so your team can focus on what matters — building intelligent products that change the world.

services.title: Everything You Need to Ship AI
services.subtitle: From model training to production deployment — one platform, zero headaches

items.title: Model Training
items.description: Distributed training on GPU clusters with automatic hyperparameter optimization and experiment tracking.

items.title: Real-time Inference
items.description: Deploy models with sub-50ms latency. Auto-scaling, A/B testing, and canary deployments built in.

items.title: Data Pipelines
items.description: Ingest, transform, and version your data with our serverless pipeline engine. Petabyte scale.

items.title: Monitoring & Observability
items.description: Track model drift, data quality, and system health in real-time with intelligent alerting.

items.title: Security & Compliance
items.description: SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA compliant. End-to-end encryption and role-based access control.

items.title: Developer SDK
items.description: Python, TypeScript, and Go SDKs. GraphQL API, CLI tools, and comprehensive documentation.

references.title: Powering the Next Wave of AI
references.subtitle: From startups to Fortune 500 — teams trust Nexus for mission-critical AI workloads

testimonials.quote: Nexus cut our model deployment time from weeks to minutes. It's the infrastructure layer we always wished we had.
testimonials.author: Dr. Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: The monitoring alone saved us from two potential production incidents. Nexus pays for itself 10x over.
testimonials.author: James Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: We evaluated every MLOps platform on the market. Nexus was the only one that actually delivered on its promises.
testimonials.author: Aiko Tanaka

careers.title: Help Us Build the Future
careers.subtitle: We're a remote-first team solving hard problems at the intersection of AI and infrastructure

positions.title: Senior Frontend Engineer
positions.description: Build the next generation of our developer dashboard and real-time monitoring tools.

positions.title: Developer Advocate
positions.description: Be the bridge between our engineering team and the developer community. Write docs, create tutorials, give talks.

positions.title: Security Engineer
positions.description: Own our security posture end-to-end. Penetration testing, threat modeling, and compliance automation.
